subject: fix(theme): use brand color for PWA status bar instead of background colors
body:
The dark mode implementation replaced the branded status bar color with
generic background colors (#ffffff/#1a1a2e), causing visibility issues
when the OS color scheme opposed the app theme (light text on light
background, or dark text on dark background). The status bar is a
branding surface — a mid-tone brand color (#10b981) provides contrast
for status bar text in both light and dark OS modes.

Tags: pwa, theme, dark-mode, status-bar, documentation
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
